import os
for f in ['train.py', 'data.py', 'model.py', 'predict.py']:
    if os.path.exists(f):
        print('=== ' + f + ' ===')
        with open(f) as fh:
            content = fh.read()
        print('lines:', len(content.split('\n')))
        print(content[:2000])
        print('...')
        print(content[-1500:])
        print()
